name: Private Tea Ceremony at Kobohji Temple (Mita)
editor_note: The rare option to wear an Oshima Tsumugi silk haori is a lovely touch. Who actually performs the ceremony is unclear — not yet verified first-hand.
notes: Venue correction by editor: temple is likely Kobohji (弘法寺) in Mita, not Asakusa. Verify address before publishing.
